name: Solar System Explorer
description: Your guide to the solar system! Get weather reports, space facts, and astronomy events.

skills.name: Solar System Weather
skills.description: Provides fun, fictional weather forecasts for planets in our solar system.
examples: What's the weather like on Mars today?

skills.name: Space Facts
skills.description: Share fascinating facts about planets, moons, and celestial objects.
examples: Tell me a fact about Saturn's rings
How big is the Sun compared to Earth?
